steps.name: Review and Fix Compilation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to review the code and fix any compilation issues
steps.prompt: Review all Solidity contracts in the current directory and subdirectories. Identify and fix any compilation errors. Run 'forge build -o out' to verify the code compiles successfully. If there are compilation errors, fix them and run 'forge build -o out' again until the code compiles without errors.

steps.name: Run Echidna Fuzzing
steps.description: Run Echidna fuzzer with specified configuration
